name: North Carolina Board of Examiners of Electrical Contractors Verify License Search

agency.name: North Carolina State Board of Examiners of Electrical Contractors

termsReviewNotes: Official NCBEEC licensing and public-search pages were reviewed; no source-specific reuse terms page was confirmed in this phase.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official public search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: North Carolina electrical contractor licenses exposed by the NCBEEC public verify-license search
knownExclusions: This source is scoped to electrical contractor licenses regulated by the North Carolina State Board of Examiners of Electrical Contractors.
General contracting, plumbing, heating, fire sprinkler, local permits, and municipal registrations are outside this source entry.
The official source is lookup-oriented; no stable machine-readable bulk export has been confirmed for OpenTrade ingestion.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should respect the public-search workflow and prefer official bulk options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official electrical-contractor lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that an authorization, local permit, or other credential does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official NCBEEC bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for North Carolina electrical contractor verification. The public search lists license classifications, but OpenTrade does not automate it without a separate access-control and terms review.
maintainerNotes: Keep this source separate from the North Carolina general contractor and plumbing/heating board entries.

researchEvidence.note: Official NCBEEC verify-license search reviewed; it exposes electrical contractor license classifications including limited, intermediate, unlimited, residential dwelling, and special restricted classifications.
Official NCBEEC licensing page reviewed for agency scope and electrical contractor licensing context.

blocker.summary: An official lookup exists, but no stable, documented machine-readable source has been adapter-reviewed with offline fixtures.
